title: The bottom line.
lede: Four things to take away before we go deeper.
points: The product team is planning the next release milestone for July 1st, and will release gradually to customers.
This launch is PART of the AI Work Platform — not a new product.
This launch completes the vision of the AI Work Platform: agents and people as one team.
Marketing focuses on 2 exciting product areas: Human & Agents collaboration, and connectivity to the AI ecosystem.
